label: 423l–1 Short title; definitions

children.heading: Short title
children.label: a Short title
children.text: Sections 423–1 to 423–6 of this title may be cited as the “Richmond National Battlefield Park Act of 2000”.ll

children.heading: Battlefield park
children.label: 1 Battlefield park
children.text: The term “battlefield park” means the Richmond National Battlefield Park.

children.heading: Secretary
children.label: 2 Secretary
children.text: The term “Secretary” means the Secretary of the Interior.
